task_id: lesson-openclaw-重装教训-删除前先停服务清残留
title: Openclaw 重装教训 删除前先停服务清残留
problem: 愚者飞书机器人无反应，尝试重装 OpenClaw。
solution:
重装前必须执行：

```bash
# 1. 停止所有 openclaw 相关进程
systemctl --user stop openclaw-gateway.service
pkill -f openclaw || true

# 2. 确认无残留
ps aux | grep openclaw  # 应为空
ss -tlnp | grep -E '18790|3456'  # 应为空

# 3. 卸载全局包
npm uninstall -g openclaw

# 4. 清理残留目录
rm -rf ~/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw
rm -rf ~/.config/openclaw

# 5. 重新安装
npm install -g openclaw --prefix ~/.npm-global

# 6. 启动
systemctl --user start openclaw-gateway.service
```
source: lessons/contrib/openclaw-重装教训-删除前先停服务清残留.md
